note: golden_hash empty until first node golden-parity.test.mjs --update.

storage_proof_composition.note: Composition hook stubbed, no on-chain storage-proof result supplied (VR-1 composes here once available); the inclusion result above is self-contained and does not depend on this.

not_proven.detail: Only the audited customer set is provable from a single-leaf inclusion proof. An issuer could omit accounts from the tree entirely and this proof cannot detect the omission.
Pledges, rehypothecation, or liens against reserve assets are not visible in a Merkle-sum inclusion proof.
This is a point-in-time snapshot at attestation time, not a continuous or real-time solvency guarantee.
This tool performs no audit and carries no PCAOB or other audit-firm opinion; it is a cryptographic inclusion check only.

output_payload.regulatory_framework: Voluntary Merkle-sum PoR attestation (Summa report structure) + Chainlink PoR/NAVLink round data; not a GENIUS Act §4 filing (see art-275) and not a PCAOB audit.
